name: Vexa Meetings
description: Deploy transcription bots to Google Meet, Teams, and Zoom meetings, get transcripts, and share them (Vexa.ai API)

credentials_required.label: Vexa API Key
credentials_required.hint: Get your API key from vexa.ai/dashboard/api-keys — starts at $12/month

tools.name: deploy_meeting_bot
tools.description: Deploy a transcription bot to a Google Meet, Teams, or Zoom meeting

tools.name: get_transcript
tools.description: Get the transcript of a meeting

tools.name: share_transcript
tools.description: Create a shareable link for a meeting transcript

tools.name: list_bots
tools.description: List all currently running meeting bots

tools.name: stop_bot
tools.description: Stop and remove a bot from a meeting

author: freddy-schuetz
